---
author: "Songjun, edited by Romana"
date: "2026-03-05"
output: html_document
---

#load package
```{r load backage} 

library(tidyverse)
library(gridExtra)
library(ggplot2)
library(reshape2)
library(ggrepel)
library(vegan)
library(viridis)
library(cowplot)
library(phyloseq)
library(SRS)
library(ANCOMBC)
library(ggpubr)
library(zCompositions)
library(readxl)
library(ggpubr)
library(emmeans)
library(DHARMa)
library(lme4)
library(ggeffects)
library(rstatix)


#many different colours
library(RColorBrewer)
qual_col_pals = brewer.pal.info[brewer.pal.info$category == 'qual',]
col_vector = unlist(mapply(brewer.pal, qual_col_pals$maxcolors, rownames(qual_col_pals)))

```


#load data
```{r}

CH4_all_translocation<-read_excel("CH4_translocation.xlsx")

CH4_all_translocation$Bay[CH4_all_translocation$Bay=="warm"]<-"heated"
CH4_all_translocation$Core[CH4_all_translocation$Core=="ori"]<-"Resident"
CH4_all_translocation$Core[CH4_all_translocation$Core=="trans"]<-"Translocated"



CH4_all_translocation <- CH4_all_translocation %>%
  mutate(Core_ID = paste(Site, Core, sep = "_"))

#add log10 ch4 value
CH4_all_translocation <- CH4_all_translocation %>%
  mutate(log10_CH4_mM = log10(`CH4(mM)`))

CH4_all_translocation_T0<-CH4_all_translocation[CH4_all_translocation$Time=="T0",]
CH4_all_translocation_T1<-CH4_all_translocation[CH4_all_translocation$Time=="T1",]


```


#check results distribution
```{r}

hist(log10(CH4_all_translocation_T0$`CH4(mM)`))

hist(log10(CH4_all_translocation_T1$`CH4(mM)`))

hist(CH4_all_translocation$`CH4(mM)`)


hist(SO4_all_translocation$`sulfate (mM)`)
hist(log10(SO4_all_translocation$`sulfate (mM)`))

#so try have the same model for alpha diversty, but the values using log10, to check how the results looks

```


#CH4 model t0
```{r}

str(CH4_all_translocation_T0)
CH4_all_translocation_T0$Bay<-as.factor(CH4_all_translocation_T0$Bay)



T0_CH4<-lmer(log10_CH4_mM~Bay*Depth+(1|Core_ID), data = CH4_all_translocation_T0)
anova(T0_CH4) # depth and depth*bay interaction sign
rand(T0_CH4) #random effect sign

eta_squared(T0_CH4)


simulateResiduals(fittedModel = T0_CH4, plot=TRUE)


```


#T0 figure
```{r}

T0_CH4_pred <- ggeffect(T0_CH4, terms = c("Depth", "Bay"))


T0_CH4_predictionplot <- ggplot(T0_CH4_pred, aes(x = x, y = predicted, color = group, fill = group)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high), alpha = 0.2, colour = NA) +
  geom_point(data = CH4_all_translocation_T0,
             mapping = aes(x = Depth, y = log10_CH4_mM, color = Bay),
             position = position_jitter(width = 0.1), alpha = 0.5,
             inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("#2166AC", "#D6191B"),name="Bay") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#2166AC", "#D6191B"),name="Bay") +
  labs(x = "Depth (cm)", y = "log10 CH4") +
  coord_flip()+
  scale_x_reverse()+
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20)) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank())

T0_CH4_predictionplot


```


#CH4 model t1
```{r}

str(CH4_all_translocation_T1)
CH4_all_translocation_T1$Bay<-as.factor(CH4_all_translocation_T1$Bay)
CH4_all_translocation_T1$Core<-as.factor(CH4_all_translocation_T1$Core)

T1_CH4<-lmer(log10_CH4_mM~Bay*Depth*Core+(1|Core_ID), data = CH4_all_translocation_T1)

T1_CH4b<-lmer(log10_CH4_mM~Bay+Depth+Core+Depth:Core+ +(1|Core_ID), data = CH4_all_translocation_T1)
T1_CH4b<-lmer(log10_CH4_mM~Bay*Depth+Bay*Core+Depth*Core+ +(1|Core_ID), data = CH4_all_translocation_T1)

summary(T1_CH4)
anova(T1_CH4)#only depth sign2
rand(T1_CH4)
eta_squared(T1_CH4)

summary(T1_CH4b)
anova(T1_CH4b)#again only depth sign2
rand(T1_CH4b)
eta_squared(T1_CH4b)



```


#T1 visulization
```{r}

#raw dot plot with depths
bay_exp_colors <- c(
  "heated_Resident"      = "#D6191B", 
  "control_Resident"     = "#2166AC", 
  "heated_Translocated"  = "#00ACC1", 
  "control_Translocated" = "#F57C00"  
)

T1_CH4_prediction <- predict_response(T1_CH4, terms = c("Depth", "Core", "Bay"))
names(T1_CH4_prediction)[names(T1_CH4_prediction) == "facet"] <- "Bay"

# Add color_group to prediction object (group = Core, Bay = facet column)
T1_CH4_prediction$color_group <- paste(T1_CH4_prediction$Bay, 
                                          T1_CH4_prediction$group, sep = "_")
CH4_all_translocation_T1$color_group <- paste(CH4_all_translocation_T1$Bay, 
                                          CH4_all_translocation_T1$Core, sep = "_")

T1_CH4_predictionplot <- ggplot(T1_CH4_prediction, aes(x = x, y = predicted, color = color_group, fill = color_group)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = group),size = 1.25) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high), alpha = 0.2, colour = NA) +
  geom_point(data = CH4_all_translocation_T1,
             mapping = aes(x = Depth, y = log10_CH4_mM, color = color_group),
             position = position_jitter(width = 0.1), alpha = 0.5,
             inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = bay_exp_colors,name="Group") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = bay_exp_colors,name="Group") +
  labs(x = "Depth (cm)", y = "log10 CH4") +
  coord_flip()+
  scale_x_reverse()+
  facet_wrap(~Bay, nrow = 2, 
           labeller = labeller(Bay = c("heated" = "T1 Heated bay", 
                                       "control" = "T1 Control bay")))+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(text = element_text(size = 16), 
        axis.title = element_text(size = 16),  # axis titles (x and y labels)
        axis.text = element_text(size = 12),   # axis tick labels
        strip.text = element_text(size = 16),  # facet labels
        panel.border = element_rect(linewidth = 1.25),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", linewidth = 1.25),
        legend.position = c(0.85, 0.85),
legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "grey80", linewidth = 0.5),
legend.title = element_text(size = 13),
legend.text = element_text(size = 11),
legend.margin = margin(4, 6, 4, 6))
 
T1_CH4_predictionplot

ggsave("log10_ch4_T1.pdf", plot = T1_CH4_predictionplot, width = 15, height = 20, units = "cm", dpi = 1200)

```


# mix CH4 plots
```{r}

# --- T0 prediction ---
T0_CH4_pred <- ggeffect(T0_CH4, terms = c("Depth", "Bay"))
T0_CH4_pred$Bay <- T0_CH4_pred$group
T0_CH4_pred$color_group <- paste(T0_CH4_pred$group, "Resident", sep = "_")
T0_CH4_pred$Timepoint <- "T0"
T0_CH4_pred$facet_label <- "T0"
T0_CH4_pred$linetype_group <- "Resident"

# --- T1 prediction ---
T1_CH4_prediction <- predict_response(T1_CH4, terms = c("Depth", "Core", "Bay"))
names(T1_CH4_prediction)[names(T1_CH4_prediction) == "facet"] <- "Bay"
T1_CH4_prediction$color_group <- paste(T1_CH4_prediction$Bay, 
                                        T1_CH4_prediction$group, sep = "_")
T1_CH4_prediction$Timepoint <- "T1"
T1_CH4_prediction$facet_label <- ifelse(T1_CH4_prediction$Bay == "control",
                                         "T1 - Control bay", "T1 - Heated bay")
T1_CH4_prediction$linetype_group <- T1_CH4_prediction$group  # "Resident" or "Translocated"

# --- T0 raw data ---
CH4_all_translocation_T0$color_group <- paste(CH4_all_translocation_T0$Bay, 
                                               "Resident", sep = "_")
CH4_all_translocation_T0$Timepoint <- "T0"
CH4_all_translocation_T0$facet_label <- "T0"
CH4_all_translocation_T0$Core <- "Resident"

# --- T1 raw data ---
CH4_all_translocation_T1$color_group <- paste(CH4_all_translocation_T1$Bay, 
                                               CH4_all_translocation_T1$Core, sep = "_")
CH4_all_translocation_T1$Timepoint <- "T1"
CH4_all_translocation_T1$facet_label <- ifelse(CH4_all_translocation_T1$Bay == "control",
                                                "T1 - Control bay", "T1 - Heated bay")

# --- Align and combine prediction objects ---
keep_cols <- c("x", "predicted", "conf.low", "conf.high", "group", 
               "Bay", "color_group", "Timepoint", "facet_label", "linetype_group")

T0_pred_combined <- T0_CH4_pred[, keep_cols]
T1_pred_combined <- T1_CH4_prediction[, keep_cols]
all_CH4_pred <- bind_rows(T0_pred_combined, T1_pred_combined)

# --- Align and combine raw data ---
raw_cols <- c("Depth", "log10_CH4_mM", "Bay", "Core", "color_group", "Timepoint", "facet_label")
all_CH4_raw <- bind_rows(
  CH4_all_translocation_T0[, raw_cols],
  CH4_all_translocation_T1[, raw_cols]
)

# --- Set factor order ---
panel_order <- c("T0", "T1 - Control bay", "T1 - Heated bay")
all_CH4_pred$facet_label <- factor(all_CH4_pred$facet_label, levels = panel_order)
all_CH4_raw$facet_label  <- factor(all_CH4_raw$facet_label,  levels = panel_order)

# --- Plot ---
CH4_combined_plot <- ggplot(all_CH4_pred, 
                             aes(x = x, y = predicted, color = color_group, fill = color_group)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = linetype_group), size = 1.25) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high), alpha = 0.2, colour = NA) +
  geom_point(data = all_CH4_raw,
             mapping = aes(x = Depth, y = log10_CH4_mM, color = color_group),
             position = position_jitter(width = 0.1), alpha = 0.5,
             inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = bay_exp_colors, name = "Group") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = bay_exp_colors, name = "Group") +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Resident" = "solid", "Translocated" = "dashed"),
                        guide = "none") +
  labs(x = "Depth (cm)", y = expression(log[10]~CH[4])) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_x_reverse() +
  facet_wrap(~facet_label, ncol = 1) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 16),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 16),
        panel.border = element_rect(linewidth = 1.25),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", linewidth = 1.25),
        legend.position = "none")

CH4_combined_plot



ggsave("log10_ch4_mix.pdf", plot = CH4_combined_plot, width = 15, height = 30, units = "cm", dpi = 1200)


```

#load tube data
```{r data}

tube_total<-read_xlsx("combined_chemical_tubes_all.xlsx")

tube_total$Depth[tube_total$Depth=="0-1"]<-0
tube_total$Depth[tube_total$Depth=="0-2"]<-0
tube_total$Depth[tube_total$Depth=="1-2"]<-1
tube_total$Depth[tube_total$Depth=="8-9"]<-8
tube_total$Depth[tube_total$Depth=="15-16"]<-15
tube_total$Depth[tube_total$Depth=="22-23"]<-22
tube_total$Depth[tube_total$Depth=="29-30"]<-29
tube_total<-tube_total[tube_total$Depth != "BW",]
tube_total$Depth<-as.numeric(tube_total$Depth)

site_list<-c("K","J","L","I","M","N1","N2","N3","E","A","F","H2","C2","C","A2","B")

tube_total$Core[tube_total$Core=="ori"]<-"Resident"
tube_total$Core[tube_total$Core=="trans"]<-"Translocated"
tube_total$Bay[tube_total$Bay=="Warm"]<-"heated"
tube_total$Bay[tube_total$Bay=="Control"]<-"control"



tube_T0<-tube_total[tube_total$Time=="T0",]
tube_T1<-tube_total[tube_total$Time=="T1",]


tube_T1_heated<-tube_T1[tube_T1$Bay=="heated",]
tube_T1_control<-tube_T1[tube_T1$Bay=="control",]


```


#check tube SO4
#T0
```{r}

str(tube_T0)

tube_T0 <- tube_T0 %>%
  mutate(SO4_mM = log10( `SO4 (mg/L)`/96))

tube_T0_SO4_model<-lmer(`SO4 (mg/L)`~Bay*Depth+(1|Site), data = tube_T0)
tube_T0_SO4_modelb<-lmer(SO4_mM~Bay*Depth+(1|Site), data = tube_T0)

summary(tube_T0_SO4_model)
anova(tube_T0_SO4_model)

summary(tube_T0_SO4_modelb)
anova(tube_T0_SO4_modelb)
rand(tube_T0_SO4_modelb)
#only depth sign


pred_tube_tube_T0_SO4_modelb <- ggeffect(tube_T0_SO4_modelb, terms = c("Depth", "Bay"))
colnames(pred_tube_tube_T0_SO4_modelb)[6]<-"Bay"


tube_T0_SO4_modelb_rawdotplot<-ggplot(pred_tube_tube_T0_SO4_modelb , aes(x = x, y = predicted, color = Bay, fill = Bay))+
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high), alpha = 0.2, colour = NA) +
  geom_point(data = tube_T0,
             mapping = aes(x = Depth, y =SO4_mM , color = Bay),
             position = position_jitter(width = 0.1), alpha = 0.5,
             inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("#2166AC","#D6191B"))+  
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#2166AC", "#D6191B")) +  
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 20),        # Increase axis title size
    axis.text = element_text(size = 20),         # Increase axis text size
    plot.title = element_text(size = 20),        # Increase plot title size
    legend.title = element_text(size = 20),      # Increase legend title size
    legend.text = element_text(size = 20)        # Increase legend text size
  ) +
  labs(x = "Depth (cm)", y = "log10 SO4") +
  coord_flip()+
  scale_x_reverse()

tube_T0_SO4_modelb_rawdotplot



```

#T1
```{r}

str(tube_T1)

tube_T1 <- tube_T1 %>%
  mutate(SO4_mM = log10( `SO4 (mg/L)`/96))

tube_T1_SO4_model<-lmer(`SO4 (mg/L)`~Bay*Depth*Core+(1|Site), data = tube_T1)
tube_T1_SO4_modelb<-lmer(SO4_mM~Bay*Depth*Core+(1|Site), data = tube_T1)

summary(tube_T1_SO4_model)
anova(tube_T1_SO4_model)

summary(tube_T1_SO4_modelb)
anova(tube_T1_SO4_modelb)
rand(tube_T1_SO4_modelb)
#depth and bay:depth sign

tube_T1_SO4_modelb2<-lmer(SO4_mM~Bay*Depth+Bay*Core+Depth*Core+(1|Site), data = tube_T1)

summary(tube_T1_SO4_modelb2)
anova(tube_T1_SO4_modelb2)
rand(tube_T1_SO4_modelb2)

tube_T1_SO4_model_heated<-lmer(SO4_mM~Depth*Core+(1|Site), data = tube_T1[tube_T1$Bay=="heated",])
anova(tube_T1_SO4_model_heated)

tube_T1_SO4_model_control<-lmer(SO4_mM~Depth*Core+(1|Site), data = tube_T1[tube_T1$Bay=="control",])
anova(tube_T1_SO4_model_control)


pred_tube_tube_T1_SO4_modelb <- ggeffect(tube_T1_SO4_modelb, terms = c("Depth","Core", "Bay"))
names(pred_tube_tube_T1_SO4_modelb)[names(pred_tube_tube_T1_SO4_modelb)== "facet"] <- "Bay"



tube_T1_SO4_modelb_rawdotplot <- ggplot(pred_tube_tube_T1_SO4_modelb, aes(x = x, y = predicted, color = group, fill = group)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high), alpha = 0.2, colour = NA) +
  geom_point(data = tube_T1,
             mapping = aes(x = Depth, y =SO4_mM , color = Core),
             position = position_jitter(width = 0.1), alpha = 0.5,
             inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("red4", "cyan4"),name="Core") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("red4", "cyan4"),name="Core") +
  labs(x = "Depth (cm)", y = "log10 SO4") +
  coord_flip()+
  scale_x_reverse()+
  facet_wrap(~Bay,nrow = 2) +
  theme_bw()+
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20))
 
tube_T1_SO4_modelb_rawdotplot






```


# mix SO4 plots
```{r}

# --- T0 prediction ---
T0_SO4_pred <- ggeffect(tube_T0_SO4_modelb, terms = c("Depth", "Bay"))
T0_SO4_pred$Bay <- T0_SO4_pred$group
T0_SO4_pred$color_group <- paste(T0_SO4_pred$group, "Resident", sep = "_")
T0_SO4_pred$Timepoint <- "T0"
T0_SO4_pred$facet_label <- "T0"
T0_SO4_pred$linetype_group <- "Resident"

# --- T1 prediction ---
T1_SO4_prediction <- predict_response(tube_T1_SO4_modelb, terms = c("Depth", "Core", "Bay"))
names(T1_SO4_prediction)[names(T1_SO4_prediction) == "facet"] <- "Bay"
T1_SO4_prediction$color_group <- paste(T1_SO4_prediction$Bay, 
                                        T1_SO4_prediction$group, sep = "_")
T1_SO4_prediction$Timepoint <- "T1"
T1_SO4_prediction$facet_label <- ifelse(T1_SO4_prediction$Bay == "control",
                                         "T1 - Control bay", "T1 - Heated bay")
T1_SO4_prediction$linetype_group <- T1_SO4_prediction$group  # "Resident" or "Translocated"

# --- T0 raw data ---
tube_T0$color_group <- paste(tube_T0$Bay,"Resident", sep = "_")
tube_T0$Timepoint <- "T0"
tube_T0$facet_label <- "T0"
tube_T0$Core <- "Resident"

# --- T1 raw data ---
tube_T1$color_group <- paste(tube_T1$Bay, tube_T1$Core, sep = "_")
tube_T1$Timepoint <- "T1"
tube_T1$facet_label <- ifelse(tube_T1$Bay == "control","T1 - Control bay", "T1 - Heated bay")

# --- Align and combine prediction objects ---
keep_cols <- c("x", "predicted", "conf.low", "conf.high", "group", 
               "Bay", "color_group", "Timepoint", "facet_label", "linetype_group")

T0_SO4pred_combined <- T0_SO4_pred[, keep_cols]
T1_SO4pred_combined <- T1_SO4_prediction[, keep_cols]
all_SO4_pred <- bind_rows(T0_SO4pred_combined, T1_SO4pred_combined)

# --- Align and combine raw data ---
raw_cols <- c("Depth", "SO4_mM", "Bay", "Core", "color_group", "Timepoint", "facet_label")
all_SO4_raw <- bind_rows(
  tube_T0[, raw_cols],
  tube_T1[, raw_cols]
)

# --- Set factor order ---
panel_order <- c("T0", "T1 - Control bay", "T1 - Heated bay")
all_SO4_pred$facet_label <- factor(all_SO4_pred$facet_label, levels = panel_order)
all_SO4_raw$facet_label  <- factor(all_SO4_raw$facet_label,  levels = panel_order)

# --- Plot ---
SO4_combined_plot <- ggplot(all_SO4_pred, 
                             aes(x = x, y = predicted, color = color_group, fill = color_group)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = linetype_group), size = 1.25) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high), alpha = 0.2, colour = NA) +
  geom_point(data = all_SO4_raw,
             mapping = aes(x = Depth, y = SO4_mM, color = color_group),
             position = position_jitter(width = 0.1), alpha = 0.5,
             inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = bay_exp_colors, name = "Group") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = bay_exp_colors, name = "Group") +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Resident" = "solid", "Translocated" = "dashed"),
                        guide = "none") +
  labs(x = "Depth (cm)", y = expression(log[10]~SO[4])) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_x_reverse() +
  facet_wrap(~facet_label, ncol = 1) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 16),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 16),
        panel.border = element_rect(linewidth = 1.25),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", linewidth = 1.25),
        legend.position = "none")

SO4_combined_plot



ggsave("log10_so4_mix.pdf", plot = SO4_combined_plot, width = 15, height = 30, units = "cm", dpi = 1200)


#plot CH4 and SO4 together
CH4_SO4_mixed_lineplot <- ggarrange(
  CH4_combined_plot,
  SO4_combined_plot,  
  labels = c("a", "b"), 
  font.label = list(size = 18),
  ncol  = 2,
  widths = c(1, 1)
)

CH4_SO4_mixed_lineplot

ggsave("CH4_SO4_mixed_lineplot_fig3.pdf", plot = CH4_SO4_mixed_lineplot, width = 30, height = 30, units = "cm", dpi = 1200)

```

```{r}

 mix_SO4_tube<-ggarrange(
  tube_T0_SO4_modelb_rawdotplot,  
  tube_T1_SO4_modelb_rawdotplot,
  labels = c("A", "B"), 
  font.label = list(size = 18),
   legend = "right", ncol =2)

mix_SO4_tube

ggsave("log10_so4_mix_tube.pdf", plot = mix_SO4_tube, width = 40, height = 25, units = "cm", dpi = 1200)

ggsave("log10_so4_mix_tube.jpg", plot = mix_SO4_tube, width = 40, height = 25, units = "cm", dpi = 1200)

```
